Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: UPC-E, UPC_E, UPC-E Code; Code39, Code39, Code 39 Code; Code39Mod43, Code39Mod43, Code 39 mod 43 Code; EAN-13, EAN_13, EAN-13 Code; EAN-8, EAN_8, EAN-8 Code; Code93, Code93, Code 93 Code; Code128, Code128, Code 128 Code; Interleaved2of5, Interleaved2of5, Interleaved 2 of 5 Code; ITF-14, ITF_14, ITF-14 Code; PDF417, PDF417, PDF417 Code; QR, QR, QR Code; Aztec, Aztec, Aztec Code; DataMatrix, DataMatrix, Data Matrix Code
